adoption.note: Verification is complete on the pinned commits. Main-branch adoption remains a repository-owner review and merge action.

limitations: P0 freezes contract and architecture drift; it does not claim the planned protocol package extractions are released.
The scoped @homenshum/nodekit npm package is not published; the verified public path is the GitHub npx invocation.
NodeSlide remains a partial no-key path because its full authoritative workflow requires a Convex account.
NodeSlide has dev-tooling audit debt, while npm audit --omit=dev reports zero production vulnerabilities.
Several repositories still declare no canonical proof receipt schema, which is visible in the ecosystem dashboard.
The official Omnigent CLI was unavailable locally; NodeAgent and NodeRoom compatibility smokes passed without claiming the official binary ran.
No paid model-provider route was invoked for this rollout.
